name: Don Robey
abstract: Don Deadric Robey (November 1, 1903 – June 16, 1975) was an American record label executive, songwriter, and record producer. As the founder of Peacock Records and the eventual owner of Duke Records, he was responsible for developing the careers of many rhythm and blues artists in the 1950s and 1960s.

about_quotes.speaker: Gene Ramey
about_quotes.evidence: But this man booked this thing for us -- Don Robey is the name. And he booked us all the way down to --

about_quotes.speaker: James "Sugarboy" Crawford
about_quotes.evidence: Yeah, Don Robey, but uh... He wasn't in charge of the deception.
